name: nowsdk-pm
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the nowsdk-pm plugin — a ServiceNow Senior Architect: architecture & design docs plus a Now SDK workspace bootstrap (deliver live with auth or fully offline).

plugins.name: nowsdk-pm
plugins.description: ServiceNow Senior Architect: from a plain-language app description, generate whole-platform architecture & design documentation (AFU) — recommending best-fit components and their delivery channel (Fluent offline / Now SDK with auth / on-platform) — then bootstrap a Now SDK workspace deliverable live (with auth) or fully offline as a no-auth Update Set XML.
